module.responsibility: Next.js App Router shell, app layout, route tree, theme, safe-area handling, bottom/app navigation.
module.produces: UI routes for day, calendar, readings, profile, onboarding, horary.

module.responsibility: Demo-mode switch controlled by NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_MODE. Demo mode returns local demo payloads; production must set it false.
module.invariants-honored: Frontend demo data is not a production data source.

module.responsibility: Typed API facades for auth, profile, day, calendar, access, readings, horary, cities/geo.
module.consumes: packages/contracts generated from backend OpenAPI plus local zod UI validators where needed.

module.responsibility: Today screen: headline, top flags, reading paragraphs, why-for-me, week strip, locked/preview states.
module.invariants-honored: Frontend renders; backend owns astrology, scoring, status, interpretation.

module.responsibility: Calendar grid, 3-month navigation window, day selection into /day/:date.
Readings hub and block rendering for natal and horary answers.
module.invariants-honored: Unknown block.type must be skipped gracefully instead of crashing.

module.responsibility: Horary question flow: quota display, category chips, time/place confirmation, credit-gated submit, polling, premium processing state, answer/history display.
module.invariants-honored: Uses weeklyFreeAvailable/bonusCredits/paidCredits, not left/nextInDays. Shows and validates question place. Default place may come from profile current location. CTA is product/premium copy.

module.responsibility: Profile display/editing for birth data, birthday location, current location, and derived user state.
Onboarding flow, city search, timezone/location resolution, profile creation.
Pydantic is the source of truth. OpenAPI is exported from backend and TypeScript contracts are generated into packages/contracts/_generated.ts and re-exported through packages/contracts/index.ts.
module.produces: C-TODAY-PAYLOAD, C-CALENDAR-PAYLOAD, C-PROFILE-PAYLOAD, C-ACCESS, C-NATAL-PAYLOAD, C-HORARY, C-AUTH, C-CHECKIN
module.invariants-honored: Do not edit packages/contracts/_generated.ts by hand. New payload shapes start in apps/api/app/schemas/*.

module.responsibility: Telegram WebApp initData HMAC validation, users upsert, session cookie issuance.
Read/write user profile, birth data, current location, birthday location, timezone fields, and invalidation triggers.
Access-state resolution from access_ledger. Consumes bonus/gift/subscription/adjustment according to product rules.
Referral invite handling and referral_bonus access ledger writes.
GET /api/day/:date orchestration: auth/profile/access/cache/calculation/semantic/LLM as currently enabled by phase.
module.depends-on: M-PROFILE, M-ACCESS, M-CALC-PIPELINE, M-SEMANTIC, M-LLM, M-MICROCOPY

module.responsibility: GET /api/calendar month grid with allowed range and day access/status information.
Natal reading contract and block-rendered frontend routes.
Horary endpoints: quota, list questions, create question, read question. Maps ORM to C-HORARY payloads.
Credit ledger: lazy subscription_weekly_free resolution, balance calculation, deterministic spend order, refund/restore behavior.
module.invariants-honored: subscription_weekly_free does not accumulate; paid credits persist; spend order is weekly-free → expiring referral/gift/adjustment → paid; no HoraryQuota/questions_used/questions_limit model.

module.responsibility: Question lifecycle: idempotency, request_hash, credit spend, async generation, TTL/failure handling, late generation guard.
module.invariants-honored: Start generation only after spend transaction commit. Same idempotencyKey + same full payload returns existing question; changed time/place/timezone returns conflict.

module.responsibility: Deterministic horary verdict context. LLM explains; it does not calculate chart facts.
module.consumes: question moment, question place, category, profile/location fallback

module.responsibility: Golden/reference collection script for parity against the split SolarSage sidecar.
SolarSage HTTP service over pyswisseph. Local-only endpoints /v1/health, /v1/natal, /v1/transits, /v1/range.
HTTP client from API to sidecar and calculation endpoints.
Builds natal, period, daily snapshots via SolarSage client and persists versioned cache rows.
Converts raw SolarSage output into AstroSignal[] and curated intermediate structures.
Versioned astrology scoring knowledge. New scoring constants belong here, not inline in Python or TypeScript.
Builds dated activation evidence and convergence context from raw factors and scoring canon.
Backend-only scoring and day status mapping. Frontend never computes dayStatus.
Top flag selection and hint preparation.
Curated SemanticLayer assembly for LLM/payload generation.
Strict JSON narration from curated context only. LLM does not calculate astrology facts, positions, aspects, scores, or horary verdicts.
Reusable microcopy lookup and miss tracking.
Evening checkin and yesterdayEcho composition into TodayPayload.
module.privacy-rule: Free-text note is private and must not be sent to LLM unless prompt_version is explicitly note-aware.

module.responsibility: arq/Redis background tasks: prewarm, pushes, reports as enabled by phase.
AI development orchestration: packets, roles, verification profiles, evidence, reviewer gates. Prefect is execution runtime only.
Project-local adapter: paths, branch, queues, role defaults, verification policy.
Role contracts/prompts for architect, planner, coder, verifier, reviewer, orchestrator.
Machine-readable packet schema for executable work packets.
Maps verification profiles to guardrail commands.

data-stores.store: Telegram identity and app user row.
Birth data, current location, birthday location, timezone fields.
Access source of truth for trial/referral/gift/subscription/adjustment windows.
Horary credit ledger: subscription_weekly_free, referral_bonus, gift, paid, adjustment.
One-credit-per-question spend ledger and idempotency backstop.
Question text, category, status, client time/timezone, question lat/lon/name, request_hash, spent credit.
Verdict, confidence, block JSON, planets/context, generated_at.

edge.trigger: horary request_hash inputs changed under same idempotency_key
edge.invalidates: request by returning IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT, not by overwriting old question
